name: interactable
description_pt: Area2D que torna o parent interagível. Detecta corpos no grupo players e emite interacted ao pressionar ui_accept. Suporta hold (segurar botão) e sinais focused/unfocused.
description_en: Area2D that makes parent interactable. Detects bodies in players group and emits interacted on ui_accept press. Supports hold and focused/unfocused signals.

parameters.name: prompt_text
parameters.description_pt: Texto do prompt (ex: 'Pressione E para abrir').

parameters.name: hold_duration
parameters.description_pt: Duração para hold (0 = pressionar uma vez).
